creator: junovitch@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 159795
Revised patch to deal with r392447 fixes

The BROKEN master sites was fixed in 392447 a few weeks ago.
https://svnweb.freebsd.org/ports?view=revision&revision=392447

So this version just adds BSDforge as one of the master sites and sets portmaster@BSDforge.com as the maintainer.
